dsl_rule.translation_notes: Breakaway bullish pattern interpreted as price breaking above previous resistance (prev_high) with confirmation above 20-day MA. Exit conditions were AUTHOR_SILENT so reversal below 20-day MA was applied as reasonable exit. Specific success rate metrics and volume data marked as AUTHOR_SILENT were not incorporated into structured conditions.

source_rule_text: Breakaway, Bullish: A candlestick pattern representing a change from a bearish mood to a bullish reversal
